item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 34min Have your say…
Do you think Rory McIlroy is the now GREATEST ever European golfer?
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 34min Have your say…
Do you think Rory McIlroy is the now GREATEST ever European golfer? 53 votos · 23 horas restantes 3 3 906

item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 57min Flying into Scotland.
Always enjoy seeing the golf courses from the air. This time
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 57min Flying into Scotland.
Always enjoy seeing the golf courses from the air. This time around it's the two courses at Loch Lomond.
(Feels like we need a 9-holer on that island too) 4 1 24 2 mil

item.title:
BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 2h Two things true scenario:
Isn’t about the licence fee.
This should be (miles and miles)
item.description:
Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 2h Two things true scenario:
Isn’t about the licence fee.
This should be (miles and miles) beneath the BBC.
Nobody needs to know what some moderately famous Arsenal fan has to say about Liverpool, either. And if they do want to the BBC shouldn’t be where they go to find out. Cita BBC Sport @BBCSport · 3h "Arsenal fans are the worst fanbase in the world."
It's fair to say Paddy Pimblett does not want Arsenal to win the league. 6 19 5 mil

item.title:
Coral: Bruce Millington reposteó Coral @Coral · 22h 𝐆𝐞𝐭 𝐌𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐒𝐜𝐨𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐡!
We invited Sean Bowen & Brendan Powell to a photoshoot
